data.name: Heavenly Hammer
data.detailed_description:
Take part in a fun battle, destroy enemies with the mouse to score points, pump up and unlock stunningly beautiful drawings of women's bodies that diversify the graphics and help you relax ;) Or will you want to turn them off and focus on the gameplay? As you wish!

Immerse Yourself In Heavenly Hammer




  • Funny physics
  • Convenient mouse control
  • Hand-drawn graphics
  • Twenty amazing drawings!
data.about_the_game:
Take part in a fun battle, destroy enemies with the mouse to score points, pump up and unlock stunningly beautiful drawings of women's bodies that diversify the graphics and help you relax ;) Or will you want to turn them off and focus on the gameplay? As you wish!

Immerse Yourself In Heavenly Hammer




  • Funny physics
  • Convenient mouse control
  • Hand-drawn graphics
  • Twenty amazing drawings!
data.short_description: Heavenly Hammer is a casual game in which you have to crush enemies with a mouse movement!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
